   "id": "71b0d590",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### Cell 1: Import Library dan Inisialisasi Data Barang"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "811965cf",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import random\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import tkinter as tk\n",
    "from matplotlib.backends.backend_tkagg import FigureCanvasTkAgg\n",
    "\n",
    "# --- DATA BARANG STUDI KASUS ---\n",
    "\n",
    "BARANG = [\n",
    "    (\"Barang1\", 10, 5),\n",
    "    (\"Barang2\", 40, 4),\n",
    "    (\"Barang3\", 30, 6),\n",
    "    (\"Barang4\", 50, 3),\n",
    "    (\"Barang5\", 35, 7)\n",
    "]\n",
    "MAKS_UKURAN = 15"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "53f99b8d",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### Cell 2: Parameter Algoritma Genetika"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "ebac1748",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "UKURAN_POPULASI = 10\n",
    "JUMLAH_GENERASI = 25\n",
    "MUTATION_RATE = 0.1\n",
    "PANJANG_KROMOSOM = len(BARANG)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "7bc86ca3",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### Cell 3: Fungsi-fungsi Utama Algoritma Genetika"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "44f8edf9",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def hitung_fitness(kromosom):\n",
    "    total_keuntungan = 0\n",
    "    total_ukuran = 0\n",
    "    \n",
    "    for i in range(PANJANG_KROMOSOM):\n",
    "        if kromosom[i] == 1:\n",
    "            total_keuntungan += BARANG[i][1]\n",
    "            total_ukuran += BARANG[i][2]\n",
    "            \n",
    "    # Jika ukuran melebihi kapasitas gudang, fitness menjadi 0 (penalti)\n",
    "    if total_ukuran > MAKS_UKURAN:\n",
    "        return 0 \n",
    "    return total_keuntungan\n",
    "\n",
    "def inisialisasi_populasi(ukuran):\n",
    "    return [[random.randint(0, 1) for _ in range(PANJANG_KROMOSOM)] for _ in range(ukuran)]\n",
    "\n",
    "# METODE SELEKSI: Roulette Wheel Selection (RWS)\n",
    "def seleksi_rws(populasi, fitness_populasi):\n",
    "    total_fitness = sum(fitness_populasi)\n",
    "    if total_fitness == 0:\n",
    "        return random.choice(populasi)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    pick = random.uniform(0, total_fitness)\n",
    "    current = 0\n",
    "    for i, fitness in enumerate(fitness_populasi):\n",
    "        current += fitness\n",
    "        if current > pick:\n",
    "            return populasi[i]\n",
    "    return populasi[-1]\n",
    "\n",
    "# METODE CROSSOVER: Two Point Crossover\n",
    "def crossover_two_point(parent1, parent2):\n",
    "    if PANJANG_KROMOSOM < 3:\n",
    "        return parent1[:], parent2[:]\n",
    "        \n",
    "    titik1 = random.randint(1, PANJANG_KROMOSOM - 2)\n",
    "    titik2 = random.randint(titik1 + 1, PANJANG_KROMOSOM - 1)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    child1 = parent1[:titik1] + parent2[titik1:titik2] + parent1[titik2:]\n",
    "    child2 = parent2[:titik1] + parent1[titik1:titik2] + parent2[titik2:]\n",
    "    \n",
    "    return child1, child2\n",
    "\n",
    "# METODE MUTASI: Inversion Mutation\n",
    "def mutasi_inversion(kromosom, rate):\n",
    "    if random.random() < rate:\n",
    "        titik1 = random.randint(0, PANJANG_KROMOSOM - 2)\n",
    "        titik2 = random.randint(titik1 + 1, PANJANG_KROMOSOM - 1)\n",
    "        kromosom[titik1:titik2+1] = kromosom[titik1:titik2+1][::-1]\n",
    "    return kromosom"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "5f8d7902",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### Cell 4: Implementasi GUI dengan Tkinter dan Eksekusi"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 8,
   "id": "99b72606",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 600x400 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "class KnapsackGUI:\n",
    "    def __init__(self, root):\n",
    "        self.root = root\n",
    "        self.root.title(\"Praktikum 10 - Algoritma Genetika\")\n",
    "        self.root.geometry(\"650x650\")\n",
    "        \n",
    "        # Frame Kontrol UI\n",
    "        frame_atas = tk.Frame(root)\n",
    "        frame_atas.pack(pady=15)\n",
    "        \n",
    "        self.btn_mulai = tk.Button(frame_atas, text=\"Jalankan Algoritma Genetika\", command=self.jalankan_ga, bg=\"#28a745\", fg=\"white\", font=(\"Arial\", 11, \"bold\"))\n",
    "        self.btn_mulai.pack()\n",
    "        \n",
    "        self.lbl_hasil = tk.Label(root, text=\"Menunggu eksekusi...\", justify=\"left\", font=(\"Consolas\", 11))\n",
    "        self.lbl_hasil.pack(pady=10)\n",
    "        \n",
    "        # Frame Grafik Matplotlib\n",
    "        self.fig, self.ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(6, 4))\n",
    "        self.canvas = FigureCanvasTkAgg(self.fig, master=root)\n",
    "        self.canvas.get_tk_widget().pack()\n",
    "\n",
    "    def jalankan_ga(self):\n",
    "        populasi = inisialisasi_populasi(UKURAN_POPULASI)\n",
    "        riwayat_terbaik = []\n",
    "        kromosom_terbaik_global = []\n",
    "        fitness_terbaik_global = -1\n",
    "        \n",
    "        for generasi in range(JUMLAH_GENERASI):\n",
    "            fitness_populasi = [hitung_fitness(ind) for ind in populasi]\n",
    "            \n",
    "            # Mendata individu terbaik di generasi ini\n",
    "            max_fitness_gen = max(fitness_populasi)\n",
    "            idx_max = fitness_populasi.index(max_fitness_gen)\n",
    "            if max_fitness_gen > fitness_terbaik_global:\n",
    "                fitness_terbaik_global = max_fitness_gen\n",
    "                kromosom_terbaik_global = populasi[idx_max][:]\n",
    "                \n",
    "            riwayat_terbaik.append(fitness_terbaik_global)\n",
    "            \n",
    "            populasi_baru = []\n",
    "            while len(populasi_baru) < UKURAN_POPULASI:\n",
    "                # 1. Proses Seleksi\n",
    "                p1 = seleksi_rws(populasi, fitness_populasi)\n",
    "                p2 = seleksi_rws(populasi, fitness_populasi)\n",
    "                \n",
    "                # 2. Proses Crossover\n",
    "                c1, c2 = crossover_two_point(p1, p2)\n",
    "                \n",
    "                # 3. Proses Mutasi\n",
    "                c1 = mutasi_inversion(c1, MUTATION_RATE)\n",
    "                c2 = mutasi_inversion(c2, MUTATION_RATE)\n",
    "                \n",
    "                populasi_baru.extend([c1, c2])\n",
    "                \n",
    "            populasi = populasi_baru[:UKURAN_POPULASI]\n",
    "\n",
    "        # Kalkulasi dan tampilkan hasil akhir\n",
    "        barang_terpilih = []\n",
    "        total_berat = 0\n",
    "        for i in range(PANJANG_KROMOSOM):\n",
    "            if kromosom_terbaik_global[i] == 1:\n",
    "                barang_terpilih.append(BARANG[i][0])\n",
    "                total_berat += BARANG[i][2]\n",
    "                \n",
    "        teks_hasil = (\n",
    "            f\"--- HASIL OPTIMAL ---\\n\"\n",
    "            f\"Kromosom Terbaik : {kromosom_terbaik_global}\\n\"\n",
    "            f\"Barang Terpilih  : {', '.join(barang_terpilih)}\\n\"\n",
    "            f\"Total Keuntungan : {fitness_terbaik_global}\\n\"\n",
    "            f\"Total Ukuran     : {total_berat} / {MAKS_UKURAN}\"\n",
    "        )\n",
    "        self.lbl_hasil.config(text=teks_hasil)\n",
    "        \n",
    "        # Render Plot Grafik\n",
    "        self.ax.clear()\n",
    "        self.ax.plot(range(1, JUMLAH_GENERASI + 1), riwayat_terbaik, marker='o', color='crimson')\n",
    "        self.ax.set_title(\"Grafik Perkembangan Fitness Terbaik\")\n",
    "        self.ax.set_xlabel(\"Generasi\")\n",
    "        self.ax.set_ylabel(\"Fitness (Keuntungan Maksimal)\")\n",
    "        self.ax.grid(True, linestyle='--', alpha=0.7)\n",
    "        self.canvas.draw()\n",
    "\n",
    "if __name__ == \"__main__\":\n",
    "    root = tk.Tk()\n",
    "    app = KnapsackGUI(root)\n",
    "    root.mainloop()"
   ]
  }
 ],
